Egg
THE COUNCIL WILL DECIDE YOUR FATE
HELL YEAH
oh no
As someone who is 5'3, I would like to inform you that I need help getting this thing down from the shelf at the supermarket please help me it's very high up and there's no steps
O_ O
Pride was great this year
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!

item.title: The 527th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2025 ep 17 - TRANS TUESDAY
item.description:
Just 5 Dump Days left of SUPER GAY MEEMAYS!
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you either when I post or when I go Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse (The Stable) and PotatoCheesMonk's (Deviousness) Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. https://discord.gg/JoinTheStable https://discord.gg/Deviousness These are both VERY safe places for LGBTQIA+ people, if you need a community, please stop in! AbbiiStabbii's server is also amazing, *especially* safe for Trans folk. @PlanckEraWasMyBestEra also has a server for Parents who are Trans https://discord.me/transparents
OC (Note: You don't always have to wear this, this is just your battle gear)
(It's either a Blåhaj or a brick)
But you're gonna wear a spinny skirt, right? Blåhaj will be Life Guard.
Unless you want them to be a good person and they're Elon.
Pants are almost as bad as Nazis. Pants are basically Leg Nazis. There. I said it.
YES
Well obviously if it's really fun you can do it.
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1392 (mysterious undeciphered symbols)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Love you too! Peek a boo!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride

item.title: None of us have met my mother though. She’s the missing link.
item.description:
MRW I find out I have a new uncle!!
MRW he tells me a lot of them were adopted out and they are trying to find everyone. Then I realize it confirms that my mom was actually a scoop victim.
But I happen to be driving through the city my new uncle lives in this weekend. I’ve asked if he’d be comfortable meeting at Tim Horton’s. MRW I’m waiting for a response…
item.dc:creator: MadameRainbowPants

item.title: What Happened Today #144
item.description: Cruelty and lies have become the new infrastructure of government. Today saw the systematic demolition of accountability paired with the institutionalization of brutality coupled with an Iranian retaliatory attack on one of our air bases. The Supreme Court didn't accidentally bless overseas torture camps. Republicans didn't randomly gut the GAO. These are deliberate choices to rebuild governance around inflicting pain and escaping consequences. Democracy doesn't survive when violence becomes policy and truth becomes optional. Every institution that still catches these lies or blocks this cruelty is under attack. Call your representatives now and demand they defend what's left before cruelty becomes so routine we stop noticing. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today or find us on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Breaking - Trump says Israel & Iran both violated ceasefire overnight 1. https://go.govbrief.today/ceasefire-confirmed 2. https://go.govbrief.today/iran-attacks-us-base 3. https://go.govbrief.today/cassidy-acip-delay 4. https://go.govbrief.today/58m-acres-logging 5. https://go.govbrief.today/lamberth-voa-answers 6. https://go.govbrief.today/senate-force-usps-sale 7. https://go.govbrief.today/parliamentarian-blocks-multiple-provisions 8. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-third-country-deportations 9. https://go.govbrief.today/house-cut-gao 10. https://go.govbrief.today/house-bans-whatsapp 11. https://go.govbrief.today/alligator-alcatraz-starts 12. https://go.govbrief.today/cbp-beats-man 13. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-wins-prelim-injunction 14. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-iran-disinformation 15. https://go.govbrief.today/media-matters-sues-ftc 16. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-statue-garden-sd Yesterday's Top - https://go.govbrief.today/gop-financial-engineering Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/pakistan-condemns-trump Free, Private GovBrief in Email - https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Burt and Heather Gummer defend their rec room in a legendary scene from Tremors in Intergalactic Quality
item.description: Source: Tremors #intergalacticqualitygifs (Check WiFi) Intergalactic Fact dump about this scene: Reba McEntire’s First Acting Role: The rec room scene features Reba McEntire as Heather Gummer, marking her debut as an actress. Director Ron Underwood initially hesitated to cast a singer but was impressed by her natural performance during auditions. Her performance earned her a Saturn Award nomination for Best Supporting Actress. Impressive Arsenal: The Gummers’ rec room showcases an extensive gun collection, including a William Moore 8-gauge shotgun (referred to as an "elephant gun"), a Remington 870, a Winchester Model 1200/1300 Defender, a Colt AR-15 Sporter II, a Steyr-Mannlicher SSG-PII rifle, a Desert Eagle Mark I, an M8 flare pistol, and various others visible on the wall, such as a Nambu Type 14 pistol and a Browning Hi-Power. The 8-gauge shotgun, rented from a private collector, fired dummy brass rounds for safety. Memorable Line: Burt’s line, “Broke into the wrong goddamn rec room, didn’t ya, you bastard!” is one of the film’s most quoted moments. It was nearly cut due to the film’s initial R-rating for profanity, but creative overdubbing in post-production helped secure a PG-13 rating, preserving the line. Practical Effects: The Graboid’s attack in the rec room relied heavily on practical effects by Amalgamated Dynamics. The creature’s tentacles and body were animatronic, and the wall breach was staged with a carefully constructed set to simulate the monster bursting through. The scene’s intensity was enhanced by the physicality of the props. Michael Gross’s Transition: Michael Gross began filming Tremors the day after wrapping his role as the liberal Steven Keaton on Family Ties. The rec room scene introduced his character, Burt Gummer, as a gun-toting survivalist, a stark contrast to his sitcom persona. Gross has noted enjoying the role, especially for depicting responsible gun safety. Heather’s Firearm Choice: In the scene, Heather debates whether Burt should take a .458 Winchester Model 70 or an M16A2 (actually an AR-15 Sporter II). She recommends the .458 for “better penetration” and less ammo weight, a detail that reflects the characters’ survivalist mindset and adds authenticity to their preparedness. Attention to Detail: A subtle detail in the scene, noted on Reddit, is that when Burt dumps a box of 8-gauge shotgun rounds on a table, it’s in front of a display of smaller cartridges, emphasizing the massive size of the elephant gun’s ammunition compared to standard rounds. Cultural Impact: The rec room scene is often cited as a fan favorite for its blend of humor, action, and horror, encapsulating Tremors’ unique tone.
item.dc:creator: BabyFarkMcGeeZax

item.title: Ludicrous Speed scene from Spaceballs in Intergalactic Quality
item.description: Source: Spaceballs #IntergalacticQualityGifs (Check WiFi) Intergalactic Fact dump about this scene: Plaid Effect Creation: The iconic “plaid” effect when Spaceball One exceeds light speed was achieved through practical and visual effects. The VFX team at Apogee, led by Grant McCune, used a combination of motion control photography and custom filters to create the checkered pattern. Mel Brooks reportedly came up with the plaid idea himself, wanting a visual that was absurdly literal to top “Ridiculous Speed.” Rick Moranis’ Improvisation: Rick Moranis, as Dark Helmet, improvised some of the scene’s funniest moments. His line, “What’s the matter, Colonel Sandurz? Chicken?” was unscripted. Sound Design: The sound effect for Ludicrous Speed was a custom creation by sound designer Gary Rydstrom. The sound team used exaggerated, cartoonish effects to match the visual gag of the ship overshooting Planet Druidia. Set and Props: The Spaceball One bridge set was built with a mix of practical and matte-painted elements to mimic the Death Star’s control room. The “Ludicrous Speed” button and control panels were deliberately over-the-top, with oversized levers and flashing lights to enhance the parody. The coffee stain on Dark Helmet’s console (visible when he’s drinking) was an intentional detail to mock sci-fi’s typically pristine aesthetics. Mel Brooks added uncredited voice effects, including a faint “whoosh” sound, to enhance the Ludicrous Speed transition.
item.dc:creator: BabyFarkMcGeeZax

item.title: Celebrating Pride Month - Day 24
item.description:
Happy Pride Month! Each day in June, I’ll be sharing the story of one LGBTQ+ person whose life and work helped shape our world. From activism to art, science to culture, let’s honor the brilliance, resilience, and humanity of our community.
Live Long And Prosper
